title: What's the maximum record we can retrieve in single request using Activity logs?
excerpt:
Could someone please help us know - What’s the maximum record we can retrieve in single request using Activity logs? 
In the document available at below path, it’s mentioned that the default value for limit argument is 2…

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could someone please help us know - What’s the maximum record we can retrieve in single request using Activity logs?

In the document available at below path, it’s mentioned that the default value for limit argument is 25 but no information is available about what’s the maximum value we can provide for it.
https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/activity-logs#arguments

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there,

The maximum amount of records you can retrieve with a request using the activity logs is 10.000.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Yash (Yash Chaudhari)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you Matias for the help here !

Wanted to double confirm when you say 10.000, it’s 10k right?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @Yash !

Yes. I am sorry. I used south american (argentinian) format there

It is 10k (ten thousand).

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
